required_assertions.description: The runtime capability shell contract parses with packages/contracts screen-contract schema.
Frontend visibility must derive from Foundry activation preflight or status surfaces, not hardcoded frontend lists.
Inactive services are hidden from clickable navigation.
Direct inactive-service routes produce unavailable or 404 behavior.
High-risk service actions must route through Gatekeeper before execution.
Opening an active runtime service must produce audit/evidence metadata.
Tenant A must not see Tenant B activation or runtime status.
